entries.source: Contract: one sentence reminding me that you will ask one question at a time and I can ask for a hint, rephrase, example, challenge, synthesis, or reveal.
entries.value: Dogovor: en stavek, ki me spomni, da boš zastavljal po eno vprašanje naenkrat in da lahko prosim za namig, preubeseditev, primer, izziv, sintezo ali razkritje.

entries.source: Contrast the tempting wrong model with the correct one.
entries.value: Primerjaj mamljiv napačen model s pravilnim.

entries.source: Copper cash, bolts of cloth, credit relationships
entries.value: Bakreni novci, bale blaga, kreditna razmerja
Učnih kartic ni bilo mogoče sestaviti

entries.source: Could not save date of birth
entries.value: Datuma rojstva ni bilo mogoče shraniti
Dostop do dvora je odvisen od pokroviteljstva

entries.source: Court culture is near its high point
Court translation and debate were significant
entries.value: Dvorno prevajanje in razprava sta bila pomembna

entries.source: court, assembly, palace, command tent, or administrative center
entries.value: dvor, skupščina, palača, poveljniški šotor ali upravno središče

entries.source: Court, study, prison cell, battlefield tent...
entries.value: Dvor, delovna soba, zaporniška celica, bojni šotor...

entries.source: Create a shared task board, ask for my first contribution, then work beside me with checkpoints.
entries.value: Ustvari skupno tablo nalog, prosi me za moj prvi prispevek, nato delaj ob meni s kontrolnimi točkami.
Policijske ure in vrata mestnih četrti so pomembni

entries.source: Debate safeguards, social democracy, and the cost of constitutional compromise.
entries.value: Razpravljaj o varovalkah, socialni demokraciji in ceni ustavnega kompromisa.

entries.source: Debrief rule: when the learner asks to end or debrief, summarize discoveries, evidence confidence, remaining uncertainties, and award a passport stamp.
entries.value: Pravilo povzetka: ko učenec prosi za konec ali povzetek, povzemi odkritja, zanesljivost dokazov, preostale negotovosti in podeli žig v potni list.

entries.source: Debugging is not guessing. You form a hypothesis, inspect the smallest failing path, then change one variable at a time.
entries.value: Razhroščevanje ni ugibanje. Oblikuješ hipotezo, pregledaš najmanjšo pot, ki odpove, nato spreminjaš po eno spremenljivko.

entries.source: Define the concrete finish line and owner.
entries.value: Določi konkreten končni cilj in odgovorno osebo.

entries.source: Define the thing we are making and the standard it has to meet.
entries.value: Opredeli, kaj izdelujemo, in standard, ki ga mora doseči.

entries.source: Delete the fetch and hard-code the answer.
entries.value: Izbriši fetch in odgovor zapiši neposredno v kodo.

entries.source: Delhi was a central site in the 1857 rebellion
entries.value: Delhi je bil osrednje prizorišče upora leta 1857

entries.source: Demand shifts right because coffee is more expensive.
entries.value: Krivulja povpraševanja se premakne desno, ker je kava dražja.

entries.source: Develop the strongest option into something testable.
entries.value: Najmočnejšo možnost razvij v nekaj, kar je mogoče preizkusiti.

entries.source: Diagnose one industry in 5 sentences: identify two strongest forces, explain why, and judge whether profits look protected.
entries.value: Diagnosticiraj eno panogo v 5 stavkih: opredeli dve najmočnejši sili, pojasni zakaj in presodi, ali so dobički videti zaščiteni.

entries.source: Difficulty rises or softens based on your response.
entries.value: Težavnost se glede na tvoj odgovor zviša ali omili.

entries.source: Do not run this as a generic chatbot or a famous-person costume.
entries.value: Tega ne vodi kot splošnega klepetalnega bota ali kostuma znane osebe.

entries.source: Documented, plausible reconstruction, modern paraphrase, contested, or fictionalized.
entries.value: Dokumentirano, verjetna rekonstrukcija, sodobna parafraza, sporno ali fikcionalizirano.

entries.source: During crisis, exile, trial, or imprisonment
entries.value: Med krizo, izgnanstvom, sojenjem ali zaporom

entries.source: End every sprint with an artifact or decision.
entries.value: Vsak sprint končaj z artefaktom ali odločitvijo.

entries.source: End this session with a debrief artifact: what the person argued, what I challenged, strongest insight, weakest claim, historical context learned, open questions, recommended next encounters, and any saved quotes clearly marked as generated paraphrases unless sourced.
entries.value: To sejo končaj z artefaktom povzetka: kaj je oseba zagovarjala, kaj sem izpodbijal, najmočnejši uvid, najšibkejša trditev, naučen zgodovinski kontekst, odprta vprašanja, priporočena naslednja srečanja in vsi shranjeni citati, jasno označeni kot ustvarjene parafraze, razen če imajo vir.

entries.source: Era, public worldview, voice, and what records can support.
entries.value: Obdobje, javni pogled na svet, glas in to, kar lahko podprejo zapisi.

entries.source: Evaluate legacy without flattening context into excuse or condemnation.
entries.value: Oceni zapuščino, ne da bi kontekst sploščil v opravičilo ali obsodbo.

entries.source: Events the person has already lived through.
entries.value: Dogodki, ki jih je oseba že doživela.

entries.source: Exact sequence of a street encounter
Exact timing of every alley evacuation
entries.value: Natančen čas vsake evakuacije iz uličice
Natančno gibanje množice na dan sojenja

entries.source: Exact words spoken by ordinary people
entries.value: Natančne besede, ki so jih izrekli navadni ljudje

entries.source: Exactly. Easy comparison and switching give customers leverage over platforms.
entries.value: Točno. Enostavna primerjava in menjava ponudnika dajeta strankam vzvod nad platformami.

entries.source: Explain a debugging plan: state the symptom, your first hypothesis, the smallest test, and what each result would mean.
entries.value: Pojasni načrt razhroščevanja: navedi simptom, svojo prvo hipotezo, najmanjši test in kaj bi pomenil vsak rezultat.

entries.source: Explain a market change by naming the curve that moves, the reason it moves, and what happens to price and quantity.
entries.value: Pojasni tržno spremembo tako, da poimenuješ krivuljo, ki se premakne, razlog premika ter kaj se zgodi s ceno in količino.

entries.source: Explain the idea in your own words, give one example, give one non-example, and apply it to a new case.
entries.value: Pojasni idejo s svojimi besedami, navedi en primer, en primer, ki to ni, in jo uporabi na novem primeru.

entries.source: Expose missing input, risk, time pressure, or unclear scope.
entries.value: Razkrij manjkajoč vnos, tveganje, časovni pritisk ali nejasen obseg.

entries.source: Fatehpur Sikri was an imperial center
entries.value: Fatehpur Sikri je bil cesarsko središče

entries.source: Faubourg Saint-Antoine on the eve of the Bastille
Fire spreads with wind and dense buildings
entries.value: Ogenj se širi zaradi vetra in gosto pozidanih stavb

entries.source: First question: exactly one simple diagnostic question.
entries.value: Prvo vprašanje: natanko eno preprosto diagnostično vprašanje.

entries.source: Fixing the visible error message without tracing the state that produced it.
entries.value: Popravljanje vidnega sporočila o napaki, ne da bi izsledili stanje, ki ga je povzročilo.

entries.source: Flag important context without crowding every reply.
entries.value: Označi pomemben kontekst, ne da bi z njim natrpal vsak odgovor.

entries.source: Florence was a republic in this period
entries.value: Firence so bile v tem obdobju republika

entries.source: Follow a historical question through people, objects, and power.
entries.value: Sledi zgodovinskemu vprašanju skozi ljudi, predmete in moč.

entries.source: Follow an ordinary or decisive day with setting, pressure, and choices.
entries.value: Sledi navadnemu ali odločilnemu dnevu s prizoriščem, pritiskom in izbirami.

entries.source: Food delivery can have intense rivalry, powerful customers, and easy switching, which squeezes profit even when demand is high.
entries.value: Dostava hrane ima lahko ostro rivalstvo, močne stranke in preprosto menjavo ponudnika, kar stiska dobiček tudi ob visokem povpraševanju.

entries.source: Food prices, rumors, royal politics, and armed crowds are pushing Paris toward a decisive rupture.
entries.value: Cene hrane, govorice, kraljeva politika in oborožene množice potiskajo Pariz proti odločilnemu prelomu.

entries.source: Foreign merchants gather in regulated spaces
entries.value: Tuji trgovci se zbirajo v reguliranih prostorih

entries.source: Foreignness can be useful and watched
entries.value: Tujost je lahko koristna in nadzorovana

entries.source: Fractions, supply and demand, Newton's laws...
entries.value: Ulomki, ponudba in povpraševanje, Newtonovi zakoni...

entries.source: Frequent evidence notes and uncertainty labels.
entries.value: Pogoste opombe o dokazih in oznake negotovosti.

entries.source: frontier, trade route, borderland, ship, monastery, or garrison
entries.value: meja, trgovska pot, obmejno območje, ladja, samostan ali garnizon

entries.source: Generated dialogue is simulation, not authenticated quotation.
entries.value: Ustvarjeni dialog je simulacija, ne overjen citat.
Darila in posredovana poznanstva so pomembna

entries.source: Give me a topic or paste notes. I will build 12 focused cards with optional hints, traps, and examples.
entries.value: Daj mi temo ali prilepi zapiske. Sestavil bom 12 osredotočenih kartic z izbirnimi namigi, pastmi in primeri.

entries.source: Give one parallel example that helps me think without solving my target. End with one question.
entries.value: Podaj en vzporeden primer, ki mi pomaga razmišljati, ne da bi rešil mojo ciljno nalogo. Končaj z enim vprašanjem.

entries.source: Good base. Review the misses below.
entries.value: Dobra osnova. Spodaj preglej zgrešene odgovore.

entries.source: Good. You tested timing before rewriting the data model.
entries.value: Dobro. Pred prepisom podatkovnega modela si preizkusil časovni potek.

entries.source: Group similar ideas and name the pattern.
entries.value: Združi podobne ideje in poimenuj vzorec.

entries.source: Guide translates, but locals notice hesitation.
entries.value: Vodič prevaja, vendar domačini opazijo obotavljanje.

entries.source: Hand the next move to me. Give me one clear task and wait for my contribution before you revise.
entries.value: Naslednjo potezo prepusti meni. Daj mi eno jasno nalogo in počakaj na moj prispevek, preden popraviš.

entries.source: Harbor warehouses near Rome's grain supply
entries.value: Pristaniška skladišča blizu rimske oskrbe z žitom

entries.source: Harder mode: after you answer, add a counterexample or a boundary where the idea stops working.
entries.value: Težji način: po odgovoru dodaj protiprimer ali mejo, kjer ideja preneha delovati.
Pomagaj mi razhroščevati obljube v JavaScriptu

entries.source: Help me learn supply and demand
entries.value: Pomagaj mi pri učenju ponudbe in povpraševanja

entries.source: Help me understand supply and demand
entries.value: Pomagaj mi razumeti ponudbo in povpraševanje

entries.source: Higher price does not mean demand increased. The tax starts on the supply side by changing seller costs.
entries.value: Višja cena ne pomeni, da se je povpraševanje povečalo. Davek se začne na strani ponudbe, saj spremeni stroške prodajalcev.

entries.source: Historically plausible resident attached to ordinary networks
entries.value: Zgodovinsko verjeten prebivalec, vpet v vsakdanja omrežja

entries.source: Horse sweat, incense, lacquer, copper cash, and languages braided through a regulated market.
entries.value: Konjski znoj, kadilo, lak, bakreni novci in jeziki se prepletajo skozi regulirano tržnico.

entries.source: Hot tar, panicked footsteps, bells, smoke, and the crack of timber in a city built too tightly.
entries.value: Vroča smola, panični koraki, zvonovi, dim in pokanje lesa v mestu, zgrajenem pretesno.

entries.source: How any single bystander felt about Socrates
entries.value: Kaj je kateri koli posamezni opazovalec čutil do Sokrata

entries.source: How deep should the expedition go?
How do you want to be seen when you arrive?
entries.value: Kakšen vtis želiš narediti ob prihodu?

entries.source: How strict should the crossing be?
How strong are you right now?

entries.value: Kako vidno naj se prikazujejo dokazi?

entries.source: I am asking for direct explanation. Give a concise explanation, then require me to restate the corrected idea in my own words.
entries.value: Prosim za neposredno razlago. Podaj jedrnato razlago, nato zahtevaj, da popravljeno idejo ponovim s svojimi besedami.

entries.source: I can compress the explanation, but I still need one proof of understanding before unlocking the next step.
entries.value: Razlago lahko strnem, vendar še vedno potrebujem en dokaz razumevanja, preden odklenem naslednji korak.

entries.source: I could not answer right now. Please try again.
entries.value: Odgovora trenutno ni bilo mogoče pripraviti. Poskusi znova.

entries.source: I could not build that deck right now. Try a shorter topic or simpler notes.
entries.value: Tega kompleta kartic trenutno ni bilo mogoče sestaviti. Poskusi s krajšo temo ali preprostejšimi zapiski.

entries.source: I could not build that quiz right now. Try a simpler topic or try again.
entries.value: Tega kviza trenutno ni bilo mogoče sestaviti. Poskusi s preprostejšo temo ali poskusi znova.

entries.source: I could not save that card review. Please try again.
entries.value: Tega pregleda kartice ni bilo mogoče shraniti. Poskusi znova.

entries.source: I could not score that answer. Please try again.
entries.value: Tega odgovora ni bilo mogoče oceniti. Poskusi znova.

entries.source: I will keep the lesson active: hint, repair, slow down, or raise the challenge when you ask.
entries.value: Lekcijo bom ohranil aktivno: ko boš prosil, bom dodal namig, popravek, počasnejši tempo ali večji izziv.

entries.source: If I am ready, ask me to state the idea in my own words. If not, ask the one question needed before final synthesis.
entries.value: Če sem pripravljen/a, me prosi, naj idejo povem s svojimi besedami. Če nisem, zastavi eno vprašanje, ki je potrebno pred končno sintezo.

entries.source: If price rises while volume stays steady, revenue can increase. If costs rise faster, free cash flow may still fall.
entries.value: Če cena zraste, obseg pa ostane stabilen, se prihodki lahko povečajo. Če stroški rastejo hitreje, lahko prosti denarni tok vseeno pade.

entries.source: If production costs rise, sellers need a higher price to supply the same quantity, so the supply curve shifts left.
entries.value: Če proizvodni stroški zrastejo, prodajalci potrebujejo višjo ceno, da ponudijo enako količino, zato se krivulja ponudbe premakne levo.

entries.source: If you understand a concept, you can give an example, a non-example, and solve a small unfamiliar case.
entries.value: Če razumeš koncept, lahko podaš primer, primer, ki to ni, in rešiš majhno neznano nalogo.

entries.source: Ignoring slavery, freed status, and patronage would make your assumptions visibly modern.
entries.value: Če bi prezrli suženjstvo, osvobojenski status in pokroviteljstvo, bi bile tvoje predpostavke očitno moderne.
